case_title: TELLEZ ARDEMIS VS ANNIE. DBA RONI JEWELRS.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TELLEZ ARDEMIS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ANNIE. DBA RONI JEWELRS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
